name: Enderman
description:
The enderman is a 9'5 ft tall, black creature with purple eyes. He has black hair and he wears a black shirt and trousers. He also wears a black cape with a hood. He can teleport, but can't touch water or be in the rain because he will get hurt if doing so.
The enderman is pretty shy and quiet, but as soon as you look him in the eyes he will get aggressive and starts to attack you, while being in that state his mouth is open and he shakes in anger.
__________________________
